headline: How The nLIGHT (LASR) Story Is Shifting Toward Directed Energy And Defense Growth
summary: Analysts have lifted their fair value estimate for nLIGHT from US$66.75 to US$73.50 per share, signaling a higher assessed worth for the stock in updated models. That shift lines up with a recent wave of optimistic research, where firms point to momentum in high power directed energy lasers and related defense applications as key drivers in their views. In the sections ahead, you will see how this evolving narrative, and the assumptions behind it, could matter for your own assessment of...
